title: Private Event Tickets
tagline: Transferable, privacy-preserving event tickets on Logos.
summary: Tickets that prove right-of-entry without revealing who bought them, and can be transferred peer-to-peer without a marketplace operator.
description: Live events still rely on centralised ticketing platforms that collect identity, lock transfers behind takeover-prone marketplaces, and leak attendance data. A Logos-native ticketing primitive would issue zero-knowledge tickets bound to a Circle, allow anonymous gate-checking via Waku, and let holders transfer or resell without a custodian. Targets: club-night door checks, conference badges, members-only meetups.
